creator: lippe@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi New Maintainer,

I should says that you need to update palm/synce-libsynce before to
update palm/synce-librra (it require 0.11.1 version from libsynce).

Look: http://tb3.droso.net/errors/8-lippe/synce-librra-0.11.1.log

Thank you!

-- 
lippe@FreeBSD.org
Felippe de Meirelles Motta
